calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Transfer Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Nov-18-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kenneth Horowitz for Raymond Wong.

The Court expressed concern stating that an estate was opened, that a Special Administrator was appointed, that special letters were extended, that the property was sold and that there was representation that the property was not Trust property. Counsel presented oral argument to support his position. The Court stated that this was not appropriate, that the probate needs to be concluded, that it was not prepared to change the course now and denied the Petition for Order Confirming Transfer of Trust Assets. The Court will prepare the order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Loos. (Not Reported)
